91.title: If students have declared “I am interested”, or “I am interested with the Erasmus Option” but it turns out that they have NOT been allocated accommodation, they are included in the single scrolling rankings (paragraph 3 of this article) and compete for the amount of the scholarship including the monetised value of the unused accommodation service (art. 5(1.3) point a), should they be scholarship winners and submit the declaration of paid accommodation;

92.title: the allocation or non-allocation of accommodation. For students who have declared “I am interested” or “I am interested with the Erasmus Month” Option, the allocation of accommodation can take place at course type or University level. Initially, the spots remaining after the winners’ acceptance are redistributed to eligible students of the same course level. Any spots still left over are redistributed within the University and, finally, if there are additional seats to be allocated, a final distribution is made based on the course location only.
